landing.title: Testea - Free QA tool for AI test scenario and case generation
landing.description: A free QA tool that turns requirements into AI-generated test scenarios and cases. Derive test suites from scenarios and track runs and results, all in one place.
landing.ogTitle: Testea - Free QA tool for AI test scenario and case generation
landing.ogDescription: From requirement-based AI scenario generation to writing test cases, running tests, and tracking results. Manage testing in one place with Testea, the free QA tool.

hero.subtitle:
Still copy-pasting test cases into spreadsheetsover and over?

With testea, the free QA tool, generate and manageyour test documents automatically in just a few clicks.

cta.buttonAria: Start creating a project for free

items.title: Test case management
items.description: As a QA tool, testea lets you write and manage test cases systematically. Organize by section and see priorities and statuses at a glance.

items.title: Test run tracking
items.description: Track QA progress in real time with testea's test runs. Record and share results such as pass, fail, and blocker instantly.

items.title: Project structure
items.description: testea is a QA tool built for organized test management. Structure your tests by project, suite, and milestone, and manage them at a glance.

items.question: What kind of QA tool is testea?
items.answer: testea is a free QA tool that lets you write test cases, run tests, and track results in one place. Manage your test documents systematically with testea instead of Excel or spreadsheets.

items.question: Is testea free?
items.answer: Yes, testea is a free QA tool. You can create a project and manage test cases right away, without signing up.

items.question: How is it different from other QA tools?
items.answer: testea is a simple test management tool you can use right away without complex setup. Writing test cases, running tests, and tracking results: handle your QA work efficiently with an intuitive interface.

items.question: Why is software test management necessary?
items.answer: Systematic test management is core to software quality assurance (QA). Documenting test cases and tracking run results helps you find bugs early and improve product quality.

items.question: Does testea generate test scenarios with AI?
items.answer: Yes. Enter your requirements and testea AI generates a requirements analysis and a draft test scenario. You can derive test suites and cases directly from the generated scenario, greatly reducing QA preparation time.

items.question: Can I manage tests based on requirements?
items.answer: testea groups test scenarios by feature (requirement). You can trace which requirement is verified by which scenario and test case, which is useful for coverage management.

legal.intro: Review the terms and policies for using the service.

team.title: The people behind testea
team.subtitleLine1: It started with one question: “Why is test management so complicated?”
team.subtitleLine2: We are building easier, more enjoyable test management, free from spreadsheets.

story.heading: Our story
story.paragraph1Prefix: testea is a test case management tool built by
story.paragraph2: We used to manage test cases in Google Sheets too. Version control was a mess, and tracking run results was even harder. “There must be a better way,” we thought.
story.paragraph3Prefix: So we decided to build it ourselves:
story.paragraph3Strong: a test management tool with less complexity, holding only what you need.
story.paragraph4Prefix: Comfortable like tea time, with the ease of a cup of tea, we named it

values.title: Simplicity
values.description: Make the complex simple, and focus on the essence of test management.

values.title: User-centered
values.description: We think and build from the perspective of QA engineers and developers.

values.title: Enjoyment
values.description: Make even tedious test management enjoyable: relaxed, like tea time.

contact.heading: Let's talk
contact.description: Feedback, suggestions, or just a hello are all welcome!
